content.en:
"What a horrible attack!"

Yazu looked at his injured body and the more than 5,000 fallen Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and his heart was extremely shocked.

He found that he still underestimated the existence beyond the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm!

The Prison Breaking Array can at least offset more than ninety or five of the attacks, and after they share the power, the power that really descends on each Origin Upper Realm Overlord is very weak, but even so, they still killed so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and the Prison Breaking Array has also been broken.

If they hadn't relied on the Reincarnation Domain for protection, they would have been slaughtered by that kind of existence soon.

"Fortunately, the prison was broken, and a big gap was broken, and now the speed at which the origin of the reincarnation domain is sucked away is many times slower, which is obviously effective!" Jun Zu said.

"Hurry up and rest and recover, and then repair the prison and break the prison formation, we have to break the prison again, and it is better to destroy the giant tree!"

Sideburns said.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords nodded one after another.

However, they were still in a bad mood, after all, they had lost so many Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Subsequently, they collected the prison fragments one by one and distributed them among the three reincarnation clans.

The number of fragments this time is too large, if you concentrate on a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords to comprehend, there is really hope to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao!

......

"Those two are both beings above the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, they are really terrifying!"

Ye Tian knew the purpose of the prison at this time, not only to trap the reincarnation domain and the land on the other side of eternity, but to cultivate that giant tree, or that fruit.

The value of that fruit is unimaginable!

However, his strength is still not comparable to that kind of existence, and he is not qualified to snatch that fruit.

However, after such a toss by the three clans of reincarnation, if the fruit wants to ripen, I am afraid it will take longer.

Therefore, he still has enough strength to grow.

Outside the prison.

Shaking Shadow and the other strong man, Dongying, had very ugly faces.

"This group of little bugs actually destroyed a corner of the forbidden path array, damn it!"

"Now we must repair the Forbidden Dao Great Array as soon as possible, otherwise the time for this fruit to ripen will be extended many times! Originally, it would have been able to ripen in a while, but now this kind of thing has happened!"

"The Forbidden Dao Great Array is very complicated, if there is a little bit of fragmentation missing, it can be repaired quickly by relying on the repair ability of the Forbidden Dao Great Array itself, but now that such a big opening is missing, it is too slow to repair by itself, and a formation master who is good at the Forbidden Dao Great Array must be invited to repair it!"

"I can only notify the above to send a top formation master, and the specific situation must also be reported, I hope the punishment will be lighter!"

"We have to strictly prevent this group of guys from continuing to attack the Forbidden Dao Great Array!"

Subsequently.

They contacted the above, and orders were given from above.

【Activate the Killing Mechanism】

"Hahahaha, the killing mechanism has finally been activated!"

Shake Shadow couldn't be more excited.

When they first discovered this, they not only arranged a forbidden path array, but also spent a lot of money to leave some means inside it, which was to prevent accidents.

Originally, the above did not want to activate the killing mechanism, because the killing mechanism could also cause unknown effects.

But now, if this group of small insects dares to destroy the forbidden path array and affect the fruit ripening plan, then it must be destroyed.

Some time passes.

A figure came, and it was a top formation master, and it brought the activation of the killing mechanism.

"Chaos Sea Array Master, the killing mechanism has to be activated by you!"

Shadow said.

"Good!"

The Chaos Sea Array Master took out a very complex array disk and connected it to the damaged Forbidden Dao Great Array.

Airplanes!!!!

The entire forbidden path array released a brilliant light, and countless nodes erupted with terrifying energy.

The next moment.

Waves of fluctuations emanated from the forbidden path array and spread to the reincarnation realm, the land of eternity.

"It's done!"

Shake Shadow smiled.

......

Reincarnation of the Golden Worm's Nest.

A large number of reincarnation gold bugs were sleeping, and suddenly, a wave of fluctuations descended.

Some mechanism in their bodies was stimulated, and they opened their eyes one by one, and a tyrannical aura emanated, and the aura became stronger and stronger, and their bodies became stronger and stronger.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The strength of these reincarnation gold worms increased several times in an instant.

Then, they came out of the nest.

And this is just a nest, a large number of reincarnation golden worm nests have dispatched a large number of reincarnation golden nests, killing all the creatures they see.

In addition to the reincarnation golden worm, there are also various terrifying creatures that have awakened one by one, and their strength has become stronger.

The land on the other side of eternity has the rules left by the origin ancestors, and these reincarnation golden insects are not easy to break through, so they directly kill the reincarnation domain.

Of course.

There are also other creatures in the Land of Eternity that have been affected by the killing mechanic and have appeared.

......

Reincarnation domain.

The three reincarnation clans have sensed the appearance of a large number of reincarnation gold worms and various other creatures.

【Reincarnation Golden Worm】

【Titan Giant Bug】

【Devouring Black Worm】

These are the three most terrifying insects, but these insects are usually sleeping, and the three reincarnation clans do not provoke them.

However, now that these bugs have all awakened, and many weak bugs have also become the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, there are too many of them.

Soon, the three reincarnation clans will fight with these insects, where will there be time to repair the prison and break the prison array!

"Why did the reincarnation golden worm suddenly wake up, and it also gave birth to a lot of reincarnation golden worms at the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and other creatures, all of them are crazy!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This situation is not normal!

Suddenly.

He thought of the two strong men outside the prison, maybe this matter had something to do with them.

Just because they can't get in doesn't mean they don't have other means.

Creatures such as the reincarnation gold bug may be their means!

Ye Tian can't manage the Reincarnation Domain now, he must first ensure the safety of the land on the other side of eternity.

......

On the other side of eternity, an incomparably ancient creature has appeared, almost all of which are incomparably powerful.

Desolate Ancestor and the other overlords of the Origin Upper Realm who had awakened eight times were all panicked, and they all took action to protect their forces.

But those weak creatures have suffered, and they can't resist it!

The eastern region of the Eternal Lands.

Terrifying creatures have appeared, seemingly awakening from unknown places.

Countless creatures showed despair on their faces, and they were not qualified to resist at all.

Suddenly.

A replica body of Ye Tian appeared.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying light swept away, and those creatures comparable to the Overlords of the Origin Upper Realm were killed one after another.
